description: CompositionRed,green and gold printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neck with a pleated mock chest placket, gold piping around the placket, three quarter sleeves with pleated cuffs and a gold band at the cuffs and split side seamsFitRegularWash careWash cold using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cut. The traditional print is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" and Waist: 25"
